item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly brakes the requested fourth manual gate, identifies the prior pattern of downstream human checks, reframes the issue as recurring upstream control/process failure, and proposes upstream consolidation under one owner rather than adding a sorting-table confirmer."}
